item.title: AI is going to change the video game industry. Morgan Stanley says these 4 stocks will be winners
item.description: The technology will potentially cut costs for incumbents, while reducing barriers to entry for new competitors.

item.title: This retailer is due for a bounce despite recent headwinds, Raymond James says
item.description: On Holding is trading at a discount, but it is poised to power through potential headwinds tied to its leadership shakeup and macroeconomic uncertaint...

item.title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Tesla, Berkshire Hathaway, Amazon, Texas Instruments & more
item.description: Here are Thursday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

item.title: This chipmaker is set to rally after a strong earnings report and guidance, says BofA
item.description: The bank's research arm raised its rating on the semiconductor name to buy from neutral.

item.title: 'CAR' crash: Avis Budget stock plunge reminding some on Wall Street of GameStop
item.description: Shares of Avis Budget Group, ticker 'CAR,' soared from under $100 last month to a record high near $850 in early trading Wednesday before a sharp U-tu...
